mapper.select: SELECT authrt_id, authrt_nm, authrt_desc, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id FROM com.tn_sys_authrt WHERE NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt ORDER BY authrt_id

SELECT authrt_id, authrt_nm, authrt_desc, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id FROM com.tn_sys_authrt WHERE authrt_id = #{authrtId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com.tn_sys_authrt (authrt_id, authrt_nm, authrt_desc, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{authrtId}, #{authrtNm}, #{authrtDesc}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE com.tn_sys_authrt SET authrt_nm = #{authrtNm}, authrt_desc = #{authrtDesc}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE authrt_id = #{authrtId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
